queries.question: Show all the Mathematics curriculum courses delivered by either online learning or in classroom teaching methods.
queries.sql:
SELECT Courses.Name 
FROM Courses
WHERE (Courses.EducationalMethod = "Online Learning" OR Courses.EducationalMethod = "Classroom Teaching") AND Courses.CurriculumContent = "Mathematics"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?courses a :Courses .
  ?courses p:name ?name .
  ?courses p:EducationalMethod ?educationalmethod_w .
  ?courses p:EducationalMethod ?educationalmethod_w2 .
  ?courses p:CurriculumContent ?curriculumcontent_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?educationalmethod_w) = "Online Learning" || STR(?educationalmethod_w2) = "Classroom Teaching")) && STR(?curriculumcontent_w) = "Mathematics"))
}

queries.question: Show all the online learning courses, also show the Mathematics courses delivered by classroom teaching.
queries.sql:
SELECT Courses.Name 
FROM Courses
WHERE Courses.EducationalMethod = "Online Learning" OR Courses.EducationalMethod = "Classroom Teaching" AND Courses.CurriculumContent = "Mathematics"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?courses a :Courses .
  ?courses p:name ?name .
  ?courses p:EducationalMethod ?educationalmethod_w .
  ?courses p:EducationalMethod ?educationalmethod_w2 .
  ?courses p:CurriculumContent ?curriculumcontent_w .
  FILTER((STR(?educationalmethod_w) = "Online Learning" || (STR(?educationalmethod_w2) = "Classroom Teaching" && STR(?curriculumcontent_w) = "Mathematics")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me all online learning courses and classroom teaching courses for Mathematics.
